source_jobs.title: Country Lead UK (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Are you passionate about ownership, SMBs and a fast-growing marked?

Do you thrive in fast-paced, hard-working and purpose-driven environments? If you're ready to use your skills to help build a stable customer base that changes the world for the better, then look no further - we want YOU!



Please note that for this role, C2 English proficiency is required. This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.



What you will do:

 - We already have a team of five talented and ambitious people - you are the layer to connect them all and have ownership of our UK motion.

 - Collaborate closely with Sales, Account Management, and Venture Development to gain a deep understanding of evolving market needs.

 - Bring the knowledge in a consolidated and prioritised format to our product team

 - Maintain a hands-on approach across both Sales and especially Account Management, building strong, lasting relationships with SMB-B2B clients, specifically solar and heat-pump installers

 - Drive growth and customer success by running product demos, managing retention strategies, and stepping in to support colleagues - especially when managing larger, high-value accounts.

 - Track (or build the system to track) market intelligence, including customer feedback, emerging opportunities, competitor moves, and industry trends, to continuously sharpen our market approach.
   
   

What Makes You a Great Fit:

 - Proven Track Record: 3+ years of experience in SMB software sales or Account Management.

 - GTM & Market Expansion Experience: Thrives in fast-paced environments with hands-on experience launching or implementing new markets.

 - UK Market Expertise: Knowledge of SMB UK sales and go-to-market dynamics, backed by firsthand experience living or working in the UK

 - Passion for product and innovation in renewable energy.

 - Strong closer with a collaborative mindset.

 - Proactive, flexible, and resilient in fast-changing environments.

 - C2 English communication skills
   
   

Why Join Us?

 - Be part of one of the fastest growing VC-backed startup in Germany with 3000+ satisfied B2B customers.

 - A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face - we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.

 - Enjoy opportunities for personal and professional growth.

 - Embrace the freedom to innovate and make quick changes in a dynamic team.

 - Perks include gym membership, coffee, regular team events, MacBook and more.

 - Receive competitive pay.



Even if you don’t meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply! Imposter syndrome shouldn't hold you back - we value talent and passion above all.

 

About Reonic

At Reonic, we’re on a mission to simplify renewable technology with our AI operating system for renewable installers. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by 3000+ business customers, we’re growing fast - and we need YOU to help us accommodate our new and existing customers.

source_jobs.title: Team Lead Account Management - Europe (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Are you passionate about renewable energy?

Do you thrive in fast-paced, hard-working and purpose-driven environments? If you're ready to use your skills to help build a stable customer base that changes the world for the better, then look no further - we want YOU!


This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.



What You’ll Do

 - Take full ownership of the Account Manager Team (>10 AMs) across multiple European markets, building, mentoring, coaching, and inspiring a high-performing, collaborative team.

 - Your onboarding will consist of diving deep into the role, taking care of a batch of customers yourself.

 - Ensure account management is the voice of the customer internally.

 - Develop and push an upsell motion in every market, NRR (net retention rate) is your north star.

 - Strategically plan and implement projects that improve efficiency & performance in the department.

 - Constantly coach the team to reach new heights, shadowing calls, joining some, and providing actionable feedback is your thing.



What Makes You a Great Fit

 - Strong knowledge of B2B customer success, and account management (5+ years experience) and proven ability to engage directly with clients.

 - You are a leader, coaching and mentoring teams to constantly reach new heights is what drives you.

 - Proven success in scaling operations and leading teams, ideally across more than one market in fast-paced environments like startups or scale ups.

 - You come either from a top tier business school, or have a technical background e.g. (industrial-) engineering

 - Previous experience in the startup ecosystem or high-growth environments.

 - Motivation to drive change in renewables and have a tangible positive impact.

 - Exceptional communication, and relationship-building skills.

 - Excellent English communication skills (C2). proficiency in French, Italian or Spanish is a plus.



Why Join Us?

 - Be part of one of the fastest growing VC-backed startup in Germany with 3000+ satisfied B2B customers.

 - A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face - we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.

 - Enjoy opportunities for personal and professional growth.

 - Embrace the freedom to innovate and make quick changes in a dynamic team.

 - Perks include gym membership, coffee, regular team events, MacBook and more.

 - Receive competitive pay.



Even if you don’t meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply! Imposter syndrome shouldn't hold you back - we value talent and passion above all.


About Reonic

At Reonic, we’re on a mission to simplify renewable technology with our AI operating system for renewable installers. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by 3000+ business customers, we’re growing fast - and we need YOU to help us accommodate our new and existing customers.

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Specialist — Spanish-Speaking Markets (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Customer Support Specialist — Spanish-Speaking Markets (Greentech) (m/f/d)



Are you passionate about renewable energy?

Do you thrive in fast-paced, hard-working and purpose-driven environments? If you're ready to use your skills to help build a stable customer base that changes the world for the better, then look no further - we want YOU!

 

Please note that for this role, C2 Spanish proficiency is required. This is a full-time position and you need to be based in São Paulo.



What You Will Do

 - Be the first line of contact for our B2B clients across Latin America, responding quickly and clearly via chat and e-mail

 - Own Tier 1 support — handle day-to-day questions like platform access, password resets, onboarding steps and basic how-to guidance

 - Keep response times low and resolution times even lower — speed and clarity are your main KPIs

 - Identify when a question is beyond Tier 1 scope and escalate seamlessly to the CSM team, with full context documented

 - Log recurring issues and customer feedback and share them with the team to help improve our product and processes

 - Contribute to building a knowledge base of common questions and answers to help us scale support efficiently



What Makes You a Great Fit

 - Fluent Spanish (native or C2 level) — this is mandatory

 - English proficiency is a strong plus

 - Previous experience in customer support, helpdesk or a similar high-volume, customer-facing role

 - Outstanding written communication skills — fast, clear, warm and professional

 - Strong sense of urgency: you understand that a quick first response changes how customers feel about us

 - No technical background required, but curiosity about software and willingness to learn the basics of our platform matters

 - Comfortable in a fast-moving startup environment where things change quickly and ownership is valued



Why Join Us?

 - Be part of one of the fastest growing VC-backed startups in Germany, with 3000+ satisfied B2B customers

 - Work closely with an experienced CSM team and grow your understanding of the full customer success journey

 - Enjoy opportunities for personal and professional growth in a company that is scaling fast across LATAM

 - Perks include gym membership (Wellhub or TotalPass), daily Uber credit for in-office days, regular team events, MacBook or Windows notebook, English Classes and more

 - Receive competitive pay



Even if you do not meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply! Imposter syndrome should not hold you back, we value communication skills and a can-do attitude above all.



About Reonic



At Reonic, we are on a mission to simplify renewable technology with our AI operating system for renewable installers. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by 3000+ business customers, we are growing fast — and we need YOU to help us deliver a fast, reliable support experience to our customers across Latin America.

source_jobs.title: Working Student Sales Development Representative (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Are you passionate about sales-sales-sales AND renewable energy?

Do you thrive in fast-paced, hard-working and purpose-driven environments? If you're ready to rise through the ranks and to use your skills to help build a stable customer base that changes the world for the better, then look no further - we want YOU!

 

Please note that this position is on-site in Berlin, C2-level proficiency in German, Italian or French is required.

 

What you will do

 - Cultivate and nurture relationships with B2B clients, such as solar and heat pump installers, by proactively reaching out to generate interest and schedule product demonstration calls.

 - Utilize multiple channels for customer acquisition, focusing on outbound calls, participation in trade shows, and creating engagement on online platforms, i.e. LinkedIn.

 - Drive Reonic’s growth by identifying and strategizing new projects and partnerships that align with the company’s business objectives.

 - Stay informed about industry trends and competitor activities to effectively meet client needs and enhance our service offerings.

 

What Makes You a Great Fit

 - Currently enrolled in a bachelor's or master's degree program and available to work up to 20 hours per week.

 - Highly motivated, driven, and committed to delivering exceptional results.

 - Passion for software sales in a fast-paced environment.

 - Proactive and flexible mindset, demonstrating a strong work ethic and commitment to excellence in all endeavors.

 - Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to engage and influence stakeholders.

 - Passion for driving transformation and innovation within the renewable energy sector.

 - C2 proficiency in German, French, or Italian, and professional proficiency in English.

 - Bonus: Familiarity with HubSpot or other types of lead generation tools.

 

Why Join Us?

 - Be part of one of the fastest growing VC-backed startup in Germany with 2000+ satisfied B2B customers.

 - A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face - we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.

 - Enjoy opportunities for personal and professional growth.

 - Embrace the freedom to innovate and make quick changes in a dynamic team.

 - Perks include gym membership, coffee, regular team events, MacBook and more.

 - Receive competitive compensation with 3,250€ OTE per month based on a 20-hour work week. The commission is uncapped.

 

Even if you don’t meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply! Imposter syndrome shouldn't hold you back - we value talent and passion above all.

 

About Reonic

At Reonic, we’re on a mission to simplify renewable technology with our AI operating system for renewable installers. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by 3000+ business customers, we’re growing fast - and we need YOU to help us accommodate our new and existing customers.

source_jobs.title: Venture Development - New Products - Italian Market (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Are you excited to work on strategic projects that accelerate the energy transition?

If you're excited about green-tech, cross-functional projects and exploring scalable solutions – then join us and make an impact. We want YOU!



Please note that for this role, C2 Italian proficiency is required. This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.



What You’ll Do

 - Own early product management and cross-team execution for new initiatives – shaping value propositions, defining MVPs, prioritizing features, aligning stakeholders, and coordinating sales, marketing, and tech for fast, smooth launches.

 - Dive quickly into new topics, markets, and customer problems, building deep understanding through frequent, direct client conversations.

 - Hands-on drive the launch of new digital products and services – from first idea to market rollout, working closely with the co-founders and senior team.

 - Talk to customers daily to uncover pain points, validate solutions, and actively promote, position, and upsell new products and features while iterating based on real-world feedback.
   
   

What Makes You a Great Fit

 - Graduated from a top university with strong entrepreneurial focus.

 - Fluent in English, with C2 level in Italian.

 - Experience in a startup environment.

 - Be hands on.

 - Curiosity about how tech, operations, and business strategy come together in high-growth companies.

 - Structured thinker who’s not afraid to get into the details, run the numbers, and execute fast.



Why Join Us?

 - A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face - we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.

 - Enjoy opportunities for personal and professional growth.

 - Embrace the freedom to innovate and make quick changes in a dynamic team.

 - Perks include gym membership, coffee, regular team events, MacBook and more.

source_jobs.title: Team Lead Sales Development Representative (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Are you passionate about renewable energy, sales and want new challenges?

Do you thrive in fast-paced, hard-working and purpose-driven environments? If you're ready to use your skills to help build our rapidly scaling customer base that changes the world for the better, then look no further - we want YOU!



Please note that for this role, C2 English proficiency is required. This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.



What you will do

 - Lead a team of Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) for the English, Italian, French, and German markets.

 - Coach and mentor the team through regular 1:1s, performance feedback, and ongoing professional development to help each rep reach their full potential.

 - Own and drive pipeline generation targets, ensuring the team consistently meets or exceeds monthly and quarterly quotas.

 - Cultivate a high-performance outbound culture, specifically focused on cold-calling pre-qualified and unqualified leads.

 - Lead by example as a player-coach, jumping onto the phones during peak times or gaps in the schedule to demonstrate best-in-class prospecting and customer-facing conversations.

 - Build and maintain a strong cold calling culture within the team. Serve as a player-coach when needed, leading by example through direct prospecting activity - including cold calling - and customer-facing conversations.

 - Partner closely with Account Executives and Sales Leadership to ensure seamless lead handoffs, high lead quality, and alignment on Ideal Customer Profiles (ICP) and target segments.

 - Identify process improvements and work with Revenue Operations to implement tools, automations, and workflows that increase team output.
   
   

What Makes You a Great Fit

 - 1+ years of hands-on experience in outbound sales and cold calling.

 - 1–2 years of leadership experience managing sales teams.

 - Passion for fast-paced environments and the SMB sales landscape.

 - Proactive, flexible, and resilient in rapidly changing settings.

 - Excellent English communication and presentation skills.

 - C2 proficiency in German, Italian, or French (in addition to English).
   
   

Why Join Us?

 - Be part of one of the fastest growing VC-backed startup in Germany with 3000+ satisfied B2B customers.

 - A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face - we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.

source_jobs.title: GTM Academy (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
A twelve-month, multi-track path into go-to-market, for ambitious graduates. You start as an SDR or Product Specialist and see the entire gtm motion — sales, solutions, marketing, revops, product. You leave knowing exactly how revenue gets built.

 

This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.



? do i need sales experience

sales experience is a plus, not a requirement. we hire for drive, communication and curiosity — we'll teach the rest.

? how long is it

twelve months, in three stages — you start as an SDR or Product Specialist, rotate through a mid-stage role, then specialize in an advanced one.

? what happens at the end

your advanced role becomes permanent — AE, AM, RevOps, Marketing or Product Management. real ownership inside reonic, not busywork.

? Start date

The program starts on 1st September with a batch of 3-4 people



What Makes You a Great Fit

 - Graduated from a top university with strong entrepreneurial focus.

 - C2 level in German, Italian, French or English

 - Experience in a startup environment.

 - Be hands on.

 - Curiosity about how tech, operations, and business strategy come together in high-growth companies.

 - Structured thinker who’s not afraid to get into the details, run the numbers, and execute fast.



Why Join Us?

 - Be part of one of the fastest growing VC-backed startup in Germany with 3000+ satisfied B2B customers.

 - A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face - we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.

 - Enjoy opportunities for personal and professional growth.

 - Embrace the freedom to innovate and make quick changes in a dynamic team.

source_jobs.title: Go-to-Market AI & Data Intern (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Do you thrive in fast-paced environments and have a passion for renewable energy?

As our Go-to-Market AI & Data Associate, you will be the co-architect of our data ecosystem. You’ll take full ownership of making customer and revenue data accessible, building internally used applications from the ground up, and deploying AI to supercharge our growth.



Please note that for this role, C2 English proficiency is required. This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.



What You’ll Do

 - AI Integration: Implement AI-driven workflows and predictive models to automate insights, lead scoring, and trend forecasting.

 - Process Innovation & AI Implementation: You will dive deep into our customer-oriented workflows to reshape them with your creative, AI-driven ideas and technical skills. As the owner of the implementation, you won't just strategize - you will personally drive these improvements from concept to reality.

 - Vertical Owner (Data Driven Analytics): You will relentlessly improve our data product experience by working with internal and external stakeholders to identify bottlenecks, refine analytical fit, and personally onboard them into a world-class, data-driven workflow.

 - Data Accessibility: Design and maintain robust pipelines to make data from our customers, HubSpot, and Aircall fully usable and accessible across the organization.

 - Hands-on Engineering: Work directly in Python (or TypeScript) to integrate diverse data sources yourself.

 - Strategic Impact: Collaborate with Sales, Marketing, and Success teams to transform complex datasets into powerful BI dashboards that drive faster, smarter decisions.



What Makes You a Great Fit

 - Extreme Drive: You are hungry, resilient, and eager to outwork the competition. You don't wait for instructions; you identify a problem and fix it.

 - You are an expert in using n8n, Python (TypeScript is a bonus)

 - You are passionate about how AI can optimize revenue processes and have the skills to implement it.

 - Bonus: Ideally, you have experience in BI or Data Engineering, with a proven track record of building data warehouses and integrating SaaS tools (like HubSpot or Aircall)

 - You are fluent in English. Proficiency in German, Italian, French or Portuguese is a plus.



Why Join Us?

 - Be part of one of the fastest growing VC-backed startup in Germany with 3000+ satisfied B2B customers.

 - A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face - we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.

 - Enjoy opportunities for personal and professional growth.

 - Perks include gym membership, coffee, regular team events, MacBook and more.

 - Embrace the freedom to innovate and make quick changes in a dynamic team.



Even if you don’t meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply! Imposter syndrome shouldn't hold you back - we value talent and passion above all.

 

About Reonic

At Reonic, we’re on a mission to simplify renewable technology with our AI operating system for renewable installers. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by 3000+ business customers, we’re growing fast - and we need YOU to help us accommodate our new and existing customers.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - Fullstack (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Are you passionate about software development AND renewable energy?

Do you thrive in fast-paced, hard-working and purpose-driven environments? If you're ready to take ownership and to use your skills to contribute across our feature rich frontend that changes the world for the better, you are based in Bavaria (or open to relocation), then look no further - we want YOU!



Please note this is a full-time, on-site position based in Augsburg.



What you will do

 - Contribute to Fullstack Development: Work on our product primarily contributing across our feature rich frontends.

 - Create Beautiful Interfaces: Build intuitive, responsive components using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

 - Deliver World-Class UX: Participate in the creation of world class User Experiences for our market.

 - Collaborate with Product & Design: Contribute to the overall look and feel of the web application alongside Product and Design team.

 - (Optional) Broaden Your Scope
   Depending on your interests and experience, there’s room to get involved with:
   
   - Node.js backends
   
   - Database design and queries (especially SQL and a tiny bonus if you love PostgreSQL!)
   
   - Integrating with Prisma ORM
   
   - Or even dabbling in Rust (not required, but a huge bonus if you’re curious)



What Makes You a Great Fit

 - Hands-On Experience: 2+ year of software development, ideally in a startup or product-driven environment.

 - Passion for Renewables: Genuine interest renewable energy (we ask for context here).

 - Self-Starter Energy: Self-starter mindset to be responsible for your own learning.

 - Ownership: We're a small team, so everyone has to be an owner. Taking accountability and ownership is baked into our DNA.

 - Drive: We value conscientious people, we work hard and we play hard.

 - Product mindset: You enjoy delighting your customer.

 - Bonus Point: Side projects, OSS or notable achievements outside of "work".



Why Join Us?

source_jobs.title: Software Engineering Intern (Greentech) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Build the Operating System of the Energy Transition

Most internships have you sitting in meetings, fixing small bugs, and watching others build.

This one doesn't.

At Reonic, you'll work on software used by thousands of renewable energy companies across Europe. You'll ship real features, solve real problems, and see your code in production within days.

We're building the AI-native operating system for renewable installers. And we're looking for ambitious builders who want to learn fast, take ownership, and make an impact from day one.

This is a full-time, on-site internship based in Berlin.


What makes this internship different

 - Your work directly impacts how renewable energy gets deployed

 - You'll ship production code used by real customers

 - You'll work closely with experienced engineers, product managers, and founders

 - You'll own projects instead of shadowing others

 - You'll see the full lifecycle: idea → implementation → customer feedback

 - No busy work. No "intern projects" disconnected from reality.

Just building, learning, and shipping.


What you'll build

 - Develop product features across our React, TypeScript, and Node.js stack

 - Turn complex business workflows into simple and intuitive user experiences

 - Work on AI-powered workflows that help installers sell and deliver renewable energy projects faster

 - Contribute to backend services, APIs, and internal tooling

 - Debug, improve, and optimize production systems

 - Collaborate closely with product and design to bring ideas to life

And if you're eager to go deeper:

 - Work with databases and PostgreSQL

 - Learn about system architecture and scalability

 - Explore AI integrations and automation workflows

 - Take ownership of larger features end-to-end

This is not a typical internship.

It's a playground for builders.


You'll thrive here if you...

 - Love building things and seeing them used by real people

 - Are curious and learn quickly

 - Prefer ownership over detailed instructions

 - Enjoy solving problems, not just writing code

 - Care about creating great user experiences

 - Want to work with ambitious people who move fast

 - Are studying Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field

Previous startup experience is a plus, but not required.

What matters most is your ability to learn, execute, and take ownership.


Why join now

 - Competitive internship compensation

 - High ownership from day one

 - Steep learning curve and rapid personal growth

 - Uber Eats and Uber rides on us when you finish late

 - Regular team events, great coffee, and a MacBook

 - A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face — we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.

 - Join one of Germany's fastest-growing VC-backed startups




Even if you don’t meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply! Imposter syndrome shouldn't hold you back - we value talent and passion above all.

 

About Reonic

At Reonic, we’re on a mission to simplify renewable technology with our AI operating system for renewable installers. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by 3000+ business customers, we’re growing fast - and we need YOU to help us accommodate our new and existing customers.

What You’ll Do

 - Solve technical problems from day one after signature and guide them through technical questions about our system and solar and heatpump (you don't need to be an expert directly).

 - Leverage customer feedback to enhance our software, in close collaboration with our development team.

 - Continuously improve customer experience and help them day to day in calls and in our support chat.

source_jobs.title: Performance Marketing Specialist (Greentech) (m/f/d)

Do you thrive in creative and data-driven environments? If you're eager to gain hands-on experience in performance marketing, copywriting, and market research while contributing to a fast-growing green tech startup, then this is the role for you – we want YOU!



Please note that for this role, C2 proficiency in German is required. This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.



What You’ll Do

 - Write compelling copy for ads, landing pages, and social media that convert visitors into leads.

 - Support in performance marketing by assisting in the creation and optimization of digital campaigns.

 - Conduct market and competitor research to identify trends and opportunities.

 - Analyze marketing funnel data to understand performance and suggest improvements.

 - Collaborate with the team to develop new marketing initiatives based on data insights.



What Makes You a Great Fit

 - Marketing experience within a software environment

 - Experience in performance marketing, copywriting, and market research.

 - Creative mindset with a knack for writing engaging content.

 - Analytical skills with the ability to interpret marketing data and optimize funnels.
